rulings.Case Title: ROBERT TIBURCIO VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, AUGUST 10, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 1. Defendant Scott Co. of California¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant did not satsify its burden of production that plaintiff does not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that he was exposed to asbestos-containing materials attributable disturbed by defendant. Plaintiff¿s deposition testimony, which was attached to defendant¿s reply and considered by the court without objection by plaitniff, precludes defendant from successfully invoking the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. Defendant¿s separate statement failed to make an issue of substantial factor causation. = (220/HEK)
